response.original_title: 隠居捜査官、再び地獄へ。 かつての仲間に復讐され快楽レズ奴隷へと堕ちていく元エリート美女。
response.overview: Kanna had retired from her work as an investigator and was spending peaceful days in her family's countryside home, healing from the wounds of her battles. However, that tranquility is suddenly snatched away. Kanna is attacked by multiple assassins and her life is put in danger. Despite being out of practice, she somehow manages to fight back and successfully subdue her assailants, but the identities hidden beneath their masks were those of her former comrades. A shaken Kanna fails to notice the attacker behind her and is knocked unconscious. When she awakens, she is imprisoned, unable to move... A vengeful lesbian training session, born of grudge and mixing love and hate, is about to begin.
response.title: Inkyo Sousakan, Futatabi Jigoku e. Katsute no Nakama ni Fukuu sare Kairaku Rezu Dorei e to Ochiteiku Moto Elite Bijo

titles.title: Inkyo Sōsakan, Futatabi Jigoku e. Katsute no Nakama ni Fukū sare Kairaku Rezu Dorei e to Ochiteiku Moto Erīto Bijo.
